title: Daily UK Education Brief
summary: DfE attendance pilots, OCR Physics resources, and AI classroom tools.

sections.title: Education News
sections.summary: DfE announced additional guidance for attendance tracking pilots.
sections.details:
The Department for Education has released new guidance for the attendance tracking pilot programme. **Key points:**

- 12 MATs participating in the initial phase
- Focus on persistent absence intervention
- Data sharing agreements required by April 30th

This could impact how schools report attendance data to central authorities.

sections.title: Physics Updates
sections.summary: OCR-aligned practical skill resources trending in teacher forums.
sections.details:
Teacher communities are sharing new resources focused on OCR A-Level Physics practical skills. The *required practicals* for 2026 exams have some subtle changes from previous years.

Popular resources this week:
- Practical skill reinforcement worksheets
- Video demonstrations of core experiments
- Mark scheme analysis for practical questions
